rationale: The citation is used in the methods section to justify the validity and reliability of the incentive-compatible WTP measure, not as a generic background mention. The authors explicitly connect their dependent variable to prior evidence from Wertenbroch and Skiera when describing how bids are elicited and interpreted. Even though it appears once, it plays a clear functional role in establishing measurement credibility for one of the main studies.
relation_description: The citing paper uses a variant of the Becker-DeGroot-Marschak incentive-compatible willingness-to-pay elicitation in Study 1a and cites Wertenbroch and Skiera (2002) to support that this method validly captures true WTP. Thus, it applies the cited paper's measurement approach as methodological support for a core empirical test.
